subject: Add reverse calculation feature - auto-calculate missing inputs
body:
This enhancement allows users to calculate any missing input based on other known values, making the calculator significantly more flexible and useful.

Features added:
- New calculation modes dropdown: Choose what to calculate
- Calculate optimal price (with 3 pricing strategies: minimum, balanced, maximum)
- Calculate required buyer value from target price
- Calculate achievable margin from current costs/price
- Calculate maximum cost ceiling from pricing targets
- Real-time updates when calculation mode or strategy changes
- Visual indication of auto-calculated fields (yellow highlight + badge)

Technical changes:
- New file: calculators/reverse-calculations.js (all reverse calculation logic)
- Updated: calculators/engine.js (integrated reverse calculations)
- Updated: ui/forms.js (calculation mode selector + pricing strategy selector)
- Updated: app.js (new event handler for calculation mode changes)
- Updated: CALCULATIONS.md (comprehensive reverse calculations documentation)
- Updated: README.md (feature description and quick start guide)

All 5 pricing models supported:
- Subscription (SaaS)
- Usage-Based
- Per-Seat (Per User)
- One-Time Purchase (Perpetual License)
- Marketplace (Two-Sided)

Mathematical basis:
- Price calculations use equilibrium theory (seller floor vs buyer ceiling)
- Buyer value calculations ensure ROI thresholds (2.5x for recurring, 2x for one-time)
- Margin calculations show what's achievable at current pricing
- Cost calculations reveal maximum viable cost structures
title: Add reverse calculation feature - auto-calculate missing inputs
